entities.raw_quote: et per Zambrim et Mambrim,

attributes.function: obedience demanded in conjuration

entities.raw_quote: per Vsuel [el] per Saduel, quibus obedire tenemini de veritate,

entities.name: Saduel

attributes.function: obedience demanded in conjuration

entities.raw_quote: per Vsuel [el] per Saduel, quibus obedire tenemini de veritate,

entities.name: Spiritus qui portet michi aurum et argentum denarios

attributes.function: brings gold, silver, and hidden treasures; serves will of conjurer

entities.raw_quote: ut facias michi venire vnum spiritum qui portet- michi aurum et argentum uel thesauros absconditos,

entities.name: Spiritus promptus et ydoneum in omni sciencia

attributes.function: grants knowledge and invisibility; serves will of conjurer

entities.raw_quote: ut adducas michi vnum spiritun promptum et ydoneum in omni sciencu et ut habeat potestatem me faciendi inuisibilem quandocumque voluero

entities.name: Barbaras

attributes.function: reveals hidden treasures; commands 36 legions

entities.raw_quote: Barbaras [est] magnus comes et dux, et apparet in signo Sagitarij siluestris... Habet sub se xxxvj legiones.

entities.name: Cason

attributes.function: reveals past/present/future; grants friendship and dignity; commands 45 legions

entities.raw_quote: Cason magnus dux est et fortis... Dat ad plenitudinem vera responsiua- de presentibus, preteritis, et futuris... Habet sub se xlv legiones.

entities.name: Otius

attributes.function: reveals hidden things; commands 36 legions

entities.raw_quote: Otius magnus preses et comes [est], et apparet in signo Vipere... Dat ad plenitudinem vera responsiua- de presentibus et futuris et occultis rebus.

entities.name: Cvrson

attributes.function: reveals hidden treasures; commands 22 legions

entities.raw_quote: Cvrson magnus rex est et fortis... Dat optimos familiares. Habet sub se xxij legiones, partim de ordine virtutum et partim de ordine thronorum.

entities.name: Alugor

attributes.function: reveals hidden things and duels; commands 1 legio

entities.raw_quote: Alugor magnus J dux est... Dat eciam milites in occursum, et dat graciam omnium regum, marchionum, et omnium militum. Habet sub se l m legiones.

entities.name: Taob

attributes.function: influences women’s love; commands 25 legions

entities.raw_quote: Taob magnus est et princeps... Dat graciam amicorum et inimicoram. Habet sub se 25- legiones,

entities.name: Volach

attributes.function: reveals hidden treasures; commands serpents; commands 27 legions

entities.raw_quote: Volach magnus preses est... Dat ad plenitudinem vera responsa de occultis thesauris... Serpentes et absque illis custodibus B posse omnium serpentum tradit in manus exorciste. Habet sub se xxvij legiones.

entities.name: Gaeneron

attributes.function: reveals hidden treasures; incites love of women; commands 27 legions

entities.raw_quote: Gaeneron dux est fortis et potens... Dat optime amorem mulierum, et precipue puellarum. Habet sub se xxvij legiones.

entities.name: Twueries

attributes.function: teaches liberal arts; reveals hidden places; commands 30 legions

entities.raw_quote: Twueries marchio magnus et fortis [est]... Docet ad plenitudinem gramaticam, loycam, rethoricam, ac dictata,- et facit loca thesaurorum aperiri,

entities.name: Hanni

attributes.function: reveals hidden treasures; commands 30 legions

entities.raw_quote: Hanni preses magnus [est]... Dat optimos familiares et graciam magnatum et principum, et loca thesaurorum que a spiritibus custodiunt[ur] mirabiliter ostendit. Habet sub se xxx legiones.

entities.name: Svcax

attributes.function: incites love of widows; commands 23 legions

entities.raw_quote: Svcax magnus marchio est... Multum mirabiliter dat amorem mulierum, et maxime omnium viduarum. Habet sub se 23 legiones.

entities.name: Bel et Ebal

attributes.function: spirits conjured in love ritual; incite burning love

entities.raw_quote: Coniuro vos spiritus infernales Bel et Ebal, quorum nomina in ista costa scripta sunt et in igne ardescunt,

entities.name: Pneumaton

attributes.function: divine name used to bind rebellious spirits

entities.raw_quote: Per nomen Pneumaton, et in nomine Pneumaton, quod Moyses nominauit et absorpti fuerunt a cauernis terre, Dath, An, et Abyron,

entities.name: Dath

attributes.function: rebellious spirit absorbed by earth

entities.raw_quote: Dath, An, et Abyron

entities.name: An

attributes.function: rebellious spirit absorbed by earth

entities.raw_quote: Dath, An, et Abyron

entities.name: Abyron

attributes.function: rebellious spirit absorbed by earth

entities.raw_quote: Dath, An, et Abyron

entities.name: Spiritus infernales

attributes.function: generic term for infernal spirits conjured

entities.raw_quote: Coniuro vos spiritus infernales Bel et Ebal...

entities.name: Thoth

attributes.function: Egyptian deity referenced as 'princeps vestrum'

entities.raw_quote: per Tothf principem vestrum,

entities.name: verbena

attributes.use: placed in circle for mirror ritual

entities.raw_quote: et inpone herbam que vocatur verbena.

entities.name: speculum

attributes.use: used in divination ritual; spirit appears in it

entities.raw_quote: Postea accipe speculum, et line ipsum cum oleo oliue cum pollice,

entities.name: oleum olivae
entities.raw_quote: line ipsum cum oleo oliue cum pollice

entities.name: lapides (from cemetery)

attributes.use: used to draw circle for mirror ritual

entities.raw_quote: Circue cimiterium et collige tot lapides quot- sunt versus in psalmo Misereri mei deus

entities.name: circulus (ceremonial)

attributes.function: protective circle drawn for spirit conjuration

entities.raw_quote: pone circulum quando vis... Hunc circulum facio in nomine dei Patris omnipotentis...

entities.name: exorcismus (Salomonis)

attributes.function: binds spirits; used when they refuse to obey

entities.raw_quote: Quod si noluerint, lege vinculum Salomonis; de vinculo spirituum non est soluendum

entities.name: Agla

attributes.function: divine name inscribed on knife and circle

entities.raw_quote: hec nomina ex utraque parte sunt scripta: Agla [et] Sabaoth... contra orientem, Agla

entities.name: Sabaoth

attributes.function: divine name inscribed on knife and circle

entities.raw_quote: hec nomina ex utraque parte sunt scripta: Agla [et] Sabaoth... contra occidentem, Tetragramaton; contra septentrionem, Adonay; contra meridiem, Sabaoth.

entities.name: Tetragramaton

attributes.function: divine name inscribed in circle

entities.raw_quote: contra occidentem, Tetragramaton

entities.name: Adonay

attributes.function: divine name inscribed in circle

entities.raw_quote: contra septentrionem, Adonay

entities.name: Thure et mirra
entities.raw_quote: accipe turribulum, inposito thure £ et mirra, [et] circuas 1 - 1 ex- [68r] teriora circuli

entities.name: cultellus cum manubrio albo uel nigro

attributes.function: used to inscribe circles and divine names

entities.raw_quote: habeat cultellum cum manubrio albo uel nigro, in cuius lamina hec nomina ex utraque parte sunt scripta: Agla [et] Sabaoth.

entities.name: Psalmi (vii)

attributes.function: recited during conjuration

entities.raw_quote: J stans contra orientem extra circulum,- dicat vij psalmos cum letania

entities.name: Misereri mei deus (Ps 50)

attributes.function: source for number of stones in circle

entities.raw_quote: Circue cimiterium et collige tot lapides quot- sunt versus in psalmo Misereri mei deus

entities.name: Alpha et O

attributes.function: divine name used in incantations

entities.raw_quote: per Alpha et O... per nomen dei ineffabile... per sanctum Tetragramaton

entities.name: Emanuel

attributes.function: divine name used in incantations

entities.raw_quote: et per Emanuel... et per nomen dei ineffabile

entities.name: Tetragramaton

attributes.function: divine name used in incantations

entities.raw_quote: per sanctum Tetragramaton

entities.name: Trinitas Sancta

attributes.function: basis for invocations and circle-making

entities.raw_quote: In nomine Patris veni, et in nomine Filij veni, et in nomine Spiritus Sancti veni... Hunc circulum facio in nomine Spiritus Sancti paracliti

entities.name: crux sancta

attributes.function: makes sign of cross over circles

entities.raw_quote: Post hec faciet crucem per omnes circulos, [dicens], Per hoc signum sancte crucis gracia dei defendat nos ab omni malo.

entities.name: costa (rib bone)

attributes.function: used in love ritual; inscribed with Bel et Ebal and burned

entities.raw_quote: scribe in costam nomen tuum et mulieris, Bel et Ebal... pone ad ignem et fac cremari costam

entities.name: ignis (fire)

attributes.function: used to burn inscribed bone in love ritual

entities.raw_quote: pone ad ignem et fac cremari costam, et quando est in maximo calore uel furore lege coniuracionem

relationships.to: spiritus qui portet aurum et argentum

summary: This chunk contains detailed excerpts from the Munich Handbook of necromancy (CLM 849), as analyzed by Kieckhefer. It includes spirit conjurations for obtaining hidden treasures and knowledge, a mirror-based divination ritual involving cemetery stones and verbena, a list of named demons with ranks and legions, a love spell using inscribed bone burned in fire, and instructions for drawing protective circles with divine names (Agla, Sabaoth, Tetragramaton, Adonay) while reciting psalms and making the sign of the cross.
key_passages: Coniuro te, Astra, Astaroth, Cebal, per Patrem et Filium et Spiritual Sanctum... vt obediatis michif
Per nomen Pneumaton, et in nomine Pneumaton, quod Moyses nominauit et absorpti fuerunt a cauernis terre, Dath, An, et Abyron...
Barbaras [est] magnus comes et dux... Habet sub se xxxvj legiones.
Coniuro vos spiritus infernales Bel et Ebal, quorum nomina in ista costa scripta sunt et in igne ardescunt, per omnes virtutes celorum et terre...
Hunc circulum facio in nomine dei Patris omnipotentis... Hunc circulum facio in nomine dei viui... Hunc circulum facio in nomine Spiritus Sancti paracliti.
